GET /api.description: serves up a json representation of all the available endpoints of the api

GET /api/topics.description: serves an array of all topics

GET /api/articles.description: serves an array of all articles

GET /api/users.description: serves an array of all users

GET /api/articles/:article_id.description: serves a single article object for a specific article_id

GET /api/articles/:article_id/comments.description: Serves an array of all comments for a specific article_id

POST /api/articles/:article_id/comments.description: Adds a comment for an article

PATCH /api/articles/:article_id/comments.description: Updates votes property for an article
